mapper.select: SELECT id, year, asset_type, sub_type, type_name, quantity, unit, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark FROM carbon_asset WHERE year = #{year} AND asset_type = #{assetType} ORDER BY id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO carbon_asset (year, asset_type, sub_type, type_name, quantity, unit, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{year}, #{assetType}, #{subType}, #{typeName}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}) ON CONFLICT (year, asset_type, sub_type) DO NOTHING

INSERT INTO carbon_asset (year, asset_type, sub_type, type_name, quantity, unit, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) VALUES (#{year}, #{assetType}, #{subType}, #{typeName}, #{quantity}, #{unit}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}) ON CONFLICT (year, asset_type, sub_type) DO UPDATE SET quantity = EXCLUDED.quantity, update_by = EXCLUDED.update_by, update_time = EXCLUDED.update_time
